calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-23-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept 611, Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Patrick Heard, 9:42AM; c/c for jury trial, Jonathan Bornstein appearing for plaintiff, no appearance by defendant in Pro Per, Andrew Morgan, case proceeds as a prove-up without defendan, Mr. Bornstein waives opening statments and begins direct examination:
LUIS BENITO S/E
EXH1 Rental agreement
No further questions, witness is thanked and excused, Mr. Bornstein submits a prayer and the court rules as follows:
Judgment for plaintiff for restitution and possession of premises at 474 Oak St. (Rear room in the back of second floor); rents $2994.18 rents and damages and $144.00 in costs, Mr. Bornstein submits the judgment form.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-23-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Continued To Dec-23-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Kathryn Quetel, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Luis Benito and there being no appearance by Defendant, Andrew Morgan, the matter was removed from the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
